title: `Eliy #5941
definition:
Eli = "ascension"

 1) descendant of Aaron through Ithamar and high priest and judge of
    Israel when Samuel entered service as a child
nasbUsage:
Definition: Eli = "ascension"

 1) descendant of Aaron through Ithamar and high priest and judge of
    Israel when Samuel entered service as a child

    NASB:  a priest at Shiloh
